title: Finding the right SHOP health insurance plan for your employees
meta-description: Find the right SHOP health insurance plan for your employees
title-short: Find the right SHOP health insurance plan for your employees
bite: Find the right SHOP health insurance plan for your employees
page_name: Finding the right SHOP health insurance plan for your employees
page_topic: Finding the right SHOP health insurance plan for your employees
excerpt: Find the right SHOP health insurance plan for your employees
content:
You have options in how you compare and enroll in plans offered through a Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP).

  1. Find out what SHOP plans may be available in your area.

    See SHOP plans & prices

    Note: Plans aren’t available in all ZIP codes.

  2. Get help from a SHOP-registered agent or broker.

    Find an agent or broker to help you compare plans and enroll, using these tools:

    • Find Local Help: Enter your ZIP code to find one in your area.
    • Help on Demand: Get help now from an agent or broker.

  3. Work directly with an insurance company.

    Contact an insurance company offering health insurance plans through a SHOP and enroll directly through them. If you are using HealthCare.gov’s See SHOP Plans and Prices tool to compare plans, you may want to write down the plan name, ‘metal’ category, plan type, and plan ID to have handy when you contact the insurance company.

Questions? Find out more about enrolling in SHOP.
